projects.title: Pricing Engine
projects.summary: Machine learning pricing workflow focused on turning model output into better pricing decisions.
projects.problem: Estimate stronger product price points from structured business signals.
projects.approach: Combined analytics, prediction, and feature thinking into a workflow designed to support pricing choices rather than just produce a score.
projects.result: Framed pricing as a practical decision-support system instead of a notebook-only exercise.

projects.title: Telecom Customer Churn Prediction
projects.summary: Retention-focused classification project built around churn signals and customer behavior.
projects.problem: Identify which customers are most likely to churn and why.
projects.approach: Worked through cleaning, exploratory analysis, feature encoding, train-test splitting, and classification to build a usable churn pipeline.
projects.result: Produced a clearer retention-oriented workflow that ties business context to modeling choices.

projects.title: Credit Card Fraud Detection
projects.summary: Fraud detection workflow centered on imbalance handling, feature work, and evaluation.
projects.problem: Detect suspicious transactions in a highly imbalanced classification setting.
projects.approach: Used notebooks to walk through cleaning, feature engineering, class-imbalance handling, and model comparison in a structured way.
projects.result: Showed careful treatment of anomaly-heavy data instead of treating fraud detection as a generic classification task.

projects.title: Weather Forecasting System
projects.summary: Forecasting project using XGBoost, NASA weather data, and an interactive web layer.
projects.problem: Turn weather signals into forecasts that are both modeled and user-facing.
projects.approach: Combined time-aware modeling, XGBoost, location-based inputs, and a web interface to move the work beyond raw predictions.
projects.result: One of the clearest examples in the portfolio of combining machine learning with product-minded delivery.

projects.title: E-Commerce Customer Segmentation
projects.summary: Clustering-driven segmentation project built to support sharper targeting decisions.
projects.problem: Group customers by behavior to support better targeting and marketing decisions.
projects.approach: Used exploratory analysis and clustering to identify meaningful behavior segments instead of focusing only on prediction.
projects.result: Shifted the work toward insight and action, not just model output.

projects.title: Metal Quality Control
projects.summary: Computer vision workflow for defect detection and segmentation in industrial parts.
projects.problem: Spot color anomalies and scratches in metal nut inspection scenarios.
projects.approach: Built a more applied visual quality-control workflow around defect detection and segmentation rather than a purely academic image task.
projects.result: Added a stronger industrial computer-vision angle to the portfolio.
